label.title: Report Users & Groups
label.description: Generate a CSV report of all Jahia users across all sites, including their group memberships. Reports are stored in JCR and can be downloaded directly from this page.
label.csvRootPathHint: JCR path where report files will be stored (e.g. /sites/systemsite/files)
label.propertiesHint: Comma-separated list of user property names to include as columns (e.g. j:firstName,j:lastName,j:email)
label.generateError: An error occurred while generating the report.
